rulings.Rulings: (MP-DEFT OSCAR E. ERICKSON) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. BURDEN SHIFTED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ESTABLISHED RE FATHER'S EXPOSURE TO ERICKSON PRODUCT BUT NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE DAUGHTER'S EXPOSURE THROUGH FATHER'S CLOTHES DURING PERIOD WHEN FATHER EXPOSED TO ERICKSON PRODUCTS. (CW)
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE EXPOSURE TO BUDD PRODUCTS OR MARKET SHARE. (CW)
MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE UNDER 437C(H) GRANTED. MOTION CONTINUED TO MARCH 20, 2002. OPPOSITION DUE MARCH 11, 2002. REPLY DUE MARCH 14, 2002. (NR)

rulings.Case Title: ALICEA VS GOLDEN EAGLE INSURANCE CORP

rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER COMPLY WITH CCP 437C(G).

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Of Cross-Defendant Birkhimer'S Motion To Strike Portions Of The Second Amended Cross-Complaint Of Douglas And Melissa Mcrae
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE ALLEGATIONS OFCONCEALMENT, DELAY DISCOVERY & BODILY INJURY OFF CALENDAR, MOOT IN LIGHT OF RULING ON DEMURRER. (CW)

DEMURRER 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF RENT ORDINANCE, 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION EXCESS CAPITAL IMPROVEMENTS, 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION, 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION NUISANCE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF CONTRACT OVERRULED. (CW)
DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION TORT OF ANOTHER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND (TORT OF ANOTHER DOCTRINE NOT APPLICABLE SEE SINDELL VS. GIBSON 54 CAL.APP.4TH 1457, 1471). (NR)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT BURDEN RE MARKET SHARE. NO SHOWING OF FACTUAL DEVOID DISCOVERY (E.G. NO INTERROGATORY ASKING FOR EVIDENCE AS TO PLAINTIFF'S JOINING SUBSTANTIAL SHARE OF MARKET). (CW)
